debug_info.goal:
S : LightProfinite
inst✝ : Nonempty ↑S.toTop
⊢ Injective (lightToProfinite.obj S)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  classical
  refine ⟨?_⟩
  intro X Y g f hf
  -- choose a lift of `g` to `S` (possible since `lightToProfinite` is full)
  let gL : X ⟶ S := (lightToProfinite.preimage g)
  have hgL : lightToProfinite.map gL = g := by
    simpa using (lightToProfinite.image_preimage g)
  -- use injectivity of `S` in `LightProfinite` to factor through `f`
  obtain ⟨kL, hkL⟩ := (show ∃ kL : Y ⟶ S, f ≫ kL = gL from
    Injective.factors (S := S) gL f hf)
  refine ⟨lightToProfinite.map kL, ?_⟩
  -- verify the factorization in `Profinite`
  have : lightToProfinite.map (f ≫ kL) = lightToProfinite.map gL := by
    simpa [hkL]
  simpa [Functor.map_comp, hgL] using this
